creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 186376
patch file

Add following files to Templates/Licenses:

AGPLv3
AGPLv3+
GPLv1+
GPLv2+
GPLv3+
GPLv3RLE+
LGPL20+
LGPL21+
LGPL3+

File 'Something+' is same as 'Something'. Strictly saying, license condition "either version X, or (at your option) any later version." isn't included in these documents. But, for example, there are so many GPLv3+ ports which specify GPLv3 document as LICENSE_FILE. So I believe adding these files has meaning enough.
